name: paper-desktop
description: The connected canvas for teams shipping with agents.
long_description: Paper connects your teams, agents, code, and data on a single design space built on web standards, so nothing gets lost in translation.

tools.name: get_basic_info
tools.description: Get essential context about the current design: file name, page name, node count, list of artboards with their dimensions, and a list of font families used in the document. Call this first to understand the canvas situation.
